purpose: Full-split gate for the new B46 champion (shared-Haar signed-orbit), promoted on the Mini gate only (champion.json full_gate was NOT_RUN). Required before submission (AGENTS.md step 7), and especially important because B46 uses a SIGN-based construction (Rademacher column diagonals on one shared Haar frame) that B31 flagged as potentially depth-32-fragile -- so B44's Full validation of B43 (25 INDEPENDENT QRs) does NOT automatically transfer -- and B44 showed the Mini gate is unreliable for orthogonal effects (it false-negatived B43), so a Mini-only promotion of B46 could equally be a B30-style false POSITIVE.
method: Ran B46 (estimator.py) on the complete 1000-MLP Full split via B26's validated chunked driver (seed_protocol_version fix, ten 100-MLP subprocess chunks). Paired per-MLP final_layer_mse and adjusted_final_layer_score by mlp_name against B26's champion Full report (estimator.py @ 2227ef3 = the submitted B25 baseline). Also compared B46's per-MLP MSE to B43's (B44 report) to check the two orthogonal constructions agree.

b46_vs_b43.note: statistically identical -- B46's single shared-Haar frame + Rademacher diagonals achieves B43's 25-independent-QR benefit at ~1/25 the QR cost

verdict: PASS -- B46's Full gate is COMPLETE and PASSES all AGENTS.md step-7 prerequisites. The orthogonal-directions MSE benefit holds robustly on the independent Full split (-21% MSE, -5.4 sigma; adjusted -23.2%, -6.0 sigma; both CIs entirely below zero; broad, not outlier-driven; zero failure flags). The B31 depth-32-sign-fragility concern does NOT apply to this construction, and B46 matches B43's benefit at ~1/25 the QR cost. B46's Full adjusted score beats last_submitted by -23.2%, far above the 5% bar.
important_findings: B46's sign-orbit construction is Full-robust -- its Mini promotion was NOT a false positive (contrast B44, where the Mini gate false-negatived B43). Verifying this was worthwhile precisely because the Mini gate has proven unreliable in both directions for orthogonal effects.
The two orthogonal constructions (B43 25-independent-QR, B46 1-shared-Haar+Rademacher) give statistically identical Full MSE -- the cheaper one is preferred and is the champion.
B46's multiplier (0.1076) is even lower than the pre-orthogonal champion's (~0.111) because it inherits B42's residual-min forward and pays only 1 QR -- so B46 wins on BOTH MSE and compute.
next_action: B46 is submission-ready. The remaining step is a submission reservation (atomic, sole-active) + network submit per AGENTS.md step 7 -- NOT performed by this B47 Full-gate infra tick (submission is a distinct, outward-facing, serialized action; the lead executed the first submission S3). Flagged in champion.submission_readiness (status READY_B46_FULL_GATE_PASSED) for the lead / next submission tick.
